title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
Protect Yourself Against an Unpredictable Situation
Introduction
Life insurance is increasingly becoming a priority in order to protect against life's unforeseen events. Especially when lifestyle choices such as lack of physical activity, bad nutrition, smoking, and excessive alcohol consumption are becoming major contributors to the development of lifestyle diseases.
Purchasing life insurance, on the other hand, appears to be a daunting undertaking for those suffering from the aforementioned conditions. Especially given the increased premium rates for such people.
However, before you dismiss the importance of life insurance, it's critical that you first understand its relevance.
Lifestyle diseases
Lifestyle diseases are illnesses that are mostly caused by people's daily lifestyle. Non-communicable illnesses are what they're called. Hypertension, obesity, diabetes, stroke, colon cancer, heart disease and disorders linked to smoking, drinking and drug addiction are all examples of lifestyle diseases. COVID-19 is an example of how comorbidities may have a significant influence on treatment outcomes and death. The best way ahead is to improve your lifestyle and enroll in a well-balanced life insurance coverage that covers lifestyle illnesses.
How can a life insurance plan secure family's financial future
While it is important to integrate lifestyle changes such as moving to a healthier lifestyle, it is also critical to safeguard yourself and your family financially which may be done through purchasing a life insurance policy. Life insurance is an instrument that provides financial support to your loved ones in the event of a tragedy.
However, the most concerning trend is that while a small percentage of people consider buying life insurance, they change their minds after learning that they will have to pay a higher premium than a healthy individual. Given that life insurance can secure your family's financial future in your absence, the premium is a price to pay. It's critical to recognise that, with the development of lifestyle illnesses, the need of having life insurance coverage is more important than ever.
Wrapping Up
It's time to appreciate the amazing life you've been given and strive to make the most of it. You don't need to go to extremes; basic things like exercising frequently and sticking to a healthy diet may make a big impact. Above all, it's critical to remember that in today's world, no one is promised protection from a lifestyle illness. As a result, take the essential measures, such as frequent screenings. Additionally, with Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Plans, ensure that your family is financially prepared to face adversity in your absence.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale.

Protect yourself against the consequence of Lifestyle Diseases with Life Insurance Meta Description: We value life and make every attempt to safeguard it from harm. As a result, getting insured in an unpredictable environment seems to be a wise decision. Keywords: life insurance, types of life insurance, buying life insurance, best life insurance policy, life insurance riders ________________________________________________________ Introduction Life insurance is increasingly becoming a priority in order to protect against life's unforeseen events. Especially when lifestyle choices such as lack of physical activity, bad nutrition, smoking, and excessive alcohol consumption are becoming major contributors to the development of lifestyle diseases. Purchasing life insurance, on the other hand, appears to be a daunting undertaking for those suffering from the aforementioned conditions. Especially given the increased premium rates for such people. However, before you dismiss the importance of life insurance, it's critical that you first understand its relevance. Lifestyle diseases Lifestyle diseases are illnesses that are mostly caused by people's daily lifestyle. Non-communicable illnesses are what they're called. Hypertension, obesity, diabetes, stroke, colon cancer, heart disease and disorders linked to smoking, drinking and drug addiction are all examples of lifestyle diseases.
2According to the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare's Survey 2019-20, the percentage of underweight people has decreased dramatically. However, the data shows alarming signs of an increase in diabetes, hypertension and other lifestyle-related illnesses in the case of non-communicable diseases. COVID-19 is an example of how comorbidities may have a significant influence on treatment outcomes and death. The best way ahead is to improve your lifestyle and enroll in a well-balanced life insurance coverage that covers lifestyle illnesses. Rise in lifestyle diseases
1According to the India Fit Report 2019, published by GOQii, the prevalence of cholesterol in India has increased by 40% overall. This increase is 135 percent among individuals under 45 years old. According to the research, among individuals under 45 years old, the incidence of diabetes has climbed by roughly 40%, and blood pressure has increased by 90%. More than 7 lakh Indians took part in the study, which was based on body mass index, stress levels, and sleep habits. It went on to say that four out of every ten Indians suffer from severe stress, and one out of every four has physical aches and pains. When the pandemic started in 2020, the risk of obesity rose owing to increased junk food consumption and a lack of physical activity at home. People's general health suffered as a result of the increase in screen time. Life insurance is an instrument that provides financial support to your loved ones in the event of a tragedy. However, the most concerning trend is that while a small percentage of people consider buying life insurance, they change their minds after learning that they will have to pay a higher premium than a healthy individual. Given that
life insurance can secure your family's financial future in your absence, the premium is a price to pay. It's critical to recognise that, with the development of lifestyle illnesses, the need of having life insurance coverage is more important than ever. Wrapping Up It's time to appreciate the amazing life you've been given and strive to make the most of it. You don't need to go to extremes; basic things like exercising frequently and sticking to a healthy diet may make a big impact. Above all, it's critical to remember that in today's world, no one is promised protection from a lifestyle illness. As a result, take the essential measures, such as frequent screenings. Additionally, with Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Plans, ensure that your family is financially prepared to face adversity in your absence. Source:
